text.title: Impl Plan Components Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Impl Plan Components.

example.scenario: A 17-TASK refactor: 12 components named (8 modules + 4 services), 17 task↔component edges, graph is acyclic with 3 leaves, 2 orphan components flagged and assigned to @ruslan, parallel scheduler can run 5 tasks concurrently.
example.trace: r1-component-per-task → r2-named-components-only → r3-explicit-dependencies → r4-no-cycles → r6-graph-emitted → artefact green
